Saltar al contenido principal

Parcial 01: Métricas de ordenamiento

Punto 2: Arreglos casi ordenados (nombres y numeros)

Ejecutar Burbuja Simple, Burbuja Mejorado, Quick Sort, Shell Sort, Seleccion Directa e Insercion sobre dos arreglos casi ordenados para comparar tiempos en ambas situaciones.

Código del punto

/*
PARCIAL 1 - PUNTO 2

Ejecuta Burbuja Simple, Burbuja Mejorado, Quick Sort, Shell Sort,
Seleccion Directa e Insercion sobre arreglos casi ordenados:
1) nombres_casi_ordenados
2) numeros_casi_ordenados
*/

import java.text.Normalizer;
import java.util.Arrays;

public class Parcial01Punto02 {

    static class Resultado {
        String algoritmo;
        long comparaciones;
        long tiempoNs;
        long memoriaBytes;

        Resultado(String algoritmo, long comparaciones, long tiempoNs, long memoriaBytes) {
            this.algoritmo = algoritmo;
            this.comparaciones = comparaciones;
            this.tiempoNs = tiempoNs;
            this.memoriaBytes = memoriaBytes;
        }
    }

    static String normalizar(String s) {
        return Normalizer.normalize(s, Normalizer.Form.NFD)
                .replaceAll("\\p{M}+", "")
                .toLowerCase();
    }

    static int compararTexto(String a, String b) {
        return normalizar(a).compareTo(normalizar(b));
    }

    interface OrdenadorTexto {
        long ordenar(String[] arr);
    }

    interface OrdenadorNumero {
        long ordenar(int[] arr);
    }

    // Situacion 1 (exacta)
    static String[] nombres_casi_ordenados = {
            "Zulma", "Yuvia", "Zuri", "Yosef", "Zósimo", "Ximena", "Zoren",
            "Xoán", "Yara", "Zenón", "Zoe", "Yurena", "Zacarías", "Xerach", "Xenia", "Xavier", "Xavi", "Xandra",
            "Xana", "Wyatt", "Winona", "Wilson", "Wilfredo", "Wifredo", "Wendy", "Wenceslao", "Walter",
            "Walda", "Viviana", "Visitación", "Viriato", "Virginia", "Violeta", "Vidal", "Victoria", "Victoriano",
            "Víctor", "Vicente", "Verónica", "Vera", "Veneranda", "Venancio", "Vania", "Vanesa", "Valery",
            "Valerio", "Valeriano", "Valeria", "Valentino", "Valentina", "Uxía", "Úrsula", "Urraca", "Urbano",
            "Unai", "Umi", "Uma", "Ulpiano", "Ulises", "Ubaldo", "Trinidad", "Triana", "Torcuato", "Tomás",
            "Tobías", "Timoteo", "Tiburcio", "Thiago", "Thais", "Teresa", "Teonila", "Teófilo", "Teodora", "Teo", "Telesforo", "Aaron", "Abel", "Abigail", "Abril", "Adán", "Adela", "Adolfo", "Adrián", "Adriana",
            "Agustín", "Ainhoa", "Aitana", "Alan", "Alba", "Alberto", "Aldana", "Alejandro", "Alejo", "Alessandra",
            "Alex", "Alfonsina", "Alfonso", "Alicia", "Alma", "Almudena", "Alonso", "Álvaro", "Amadeo", "Amalia",
            "Amanda", "Amparo", "Ana", "Anabel", "Anahí", "Ander", "Andrea", "Andrés", "Ángel", "Ángela",
            "Angélica", "Aníbal", "Antía", "Antón", "Antonia", "Antonio", "Ariadna", "Ariel", "Arlet", "Arnaldo",
            "Arnau", "Arturo", "Asier", "Asunción", "Augusto", "Aurea", "Aurora", "Axel", "Aylin", "Azahara",
            "Bárbara", "Bartolomé", "Basilio", "Bautista", "Beatriz", "Begoña", "Belén", "Beltrán", "Benicio",
            "Benjamín", "Benito", "Berenice", "Bernardo", "Berta", "Bianca", "Biel", "Blanca", "Blas", "Boris",
            "Braulio", "Breixo", "Brígida", "Bruna", "Bruno", "Bryan", "Caín", "Caleb", "Camilo", "Candela",
            "Candelaria", "Carina", "Carla", "Carlos", "Carmelo", "Carmen", "Carolina", "Casandra", "Casimiro",
            "Catalina", "Cayetana", "Cecilia", "Ceferino", "Celia", "Celina", "César", "Chantal", "Charo", "Chema",
            "Christian", "Cintia", "Cipriano", "Cira", "Ciro", "Clara", "Claudio", "Clemente", "Cleotilde", "Clotilde",
            "Concepción", "Conrado", "Constanza", "Consuelo", "Coral", "Cordelia", "Cosme", "Cristian",
            "Cristina", "Cristóbal", "Cruz", "Custodia", "Dalia", "Dalma", "Damián", "Dánae", "Daniel", "Daniela",
            "Dante", "Darío", "David", "Dayana", "Débora", "Delfina", "Delia", "Demian", "Denis", "Desiré",
            "Diana", "Diego", "Dina", "Dionisio", "Dolores", "Domingo", "Donato", "Dora", "Doris", "Dulce",
            "Eber", "Edgar", "Edith", "Edmundo", "Eduardo", "Efraín", "Eider", "Eladio", "Eleazar", "Elena",
            "Eliana", "Elías", "Elisa", "Elisabet", "Eloy", "Elsa", "Elvira", "Emanuel", "Emilia", "Emiliano", "Emilio",
            "Emma", "Enrique", "Enzo", "Epifanio", "Eric", "Erick", "Erika", "Ernesto", "Esmeralda", "Esperanza",
            "Esteban", "Estefanía", "Estela", "Ester", "Esther", "Estrella", "Eugenia", "Eugenio", "Eulalia",
            "Eusebio", "Eva", "Evangelina", "Evelyn", "Ezequiel", "Fabiana", "Fabiano", "Fabio", "Fabiola",
            "Facundo", "Fátima", "Faustino", "Fausto", "Federico", "Feliciano", "Felipe", "Félix", "Fermín",
            "Fernanda", "Fernando", "Fidencio", "Fiona", "Fiorella", "Flavia", "Flavio", "Flora", "Florencia",
            "Florentino", "Fortunato", "Francesco"
    };

    // Situacion 2 (exacta)
    static int[] numeros_casi_ordenados = {
            2491, 1083, 3922, 1045, 5671, 8234, 1012, 4456, 9012, 1033,
            2289, 7341, 1095, 6612, 1004, 3345, 1077, 8890, 1056, 4123, 1102, 5567, 1028, 9934, 1069, 2145,
            1088, 7756, 1041, 3021, 1099, 6643, 1007, 8812, 1052, 4409, 1105, 5521, 1024, 9134, 1065, 2045,
            1081, 7156, 1047, 3121, 1093, 6243, 1001, 8212, 1058, 4109, 1101, 5121, 1029, 9234, 1061, 2245,
            1086, 7256, 1043, 3221, 1091, 6343, 1015, 8312, 1054, 4209, 1106, 5221, 1022, 9334, 1067, 2345,
            1089, 9301, 9302, 9303, 9304, 9305, 9306, 9307, 9308, 9309, 9310, 9311, 9312, 9313, 9314, 9315,
            9316, 9317, 9318, 9319, 9320, 9321, 9322, 9323, 9324, 9325, 9326, 9327, 9328, 9329, 9330, 9331,
            9332, 9333, 9334, 9335, 9336, 9337, 9338, 9339, 9340, 9341, 9342, 9343, 9344, 9345, 9346, 9347,
            9348, 9349, 9350, 9351, 9352, 9353, 9354, 9355, 9356, 9357, 9358, 9359, 9360, 9361, 9362, 9363,
            9364, 9365, 9366, 9367, 9368, 9369, 9370, 9371, 9372, 9373, 9374, 9375, 4567, 8912, 1234, 5678,
            9023, 3456, 7890, 2345, 6789, 1122, 4433, 7788, 2299, 5566, 8811, 3344, 6677, 9900, 1357, 2468,
            9753, 8642, 1111, 2222, 3333, 4444, 5555, 6666, 7777, 8888, 9999, 1010, 2020, 3030, 4040, 5050,
            6060, 7070, 8080, 9090, 1212, 2323, 3434, 4545, 5656, 6767, 7878, 8989, 1414, 2525, 3636, 4747,
            5858, 6969, 7071, 8181, 9292, 1515, 2626, 3737, 4848, 5959, 1616, 2727, 3838, 4949, 1717, 2828,
            3939, 5151, 6262, 7373, 8484, 9595, 1818, 2929, 4141, 5252, 6363, 7474, 8585, 9696, 1919, 3131,
            4242, 5353, 6464, 7575, 8686, 9797, 2121, 3232, 4343, 5454, 6565, 7676, 8787, 9898, 1000, 2000,
            3000, 4000, 5000, 6000, 7000, 8000, 9000, 1500, 2500, 3500, 4500, 5500, 6500, 7500, 8500, 9500,
            1250, 2250, 3250, 4250, 5250, 6250, 7250, 8250, 9250, 1750, 2750, 3750, 4750, 5750, 6750, 7750,
            8750, 9750, 1100, 2100, 3100, 4100, 5100, 6100, 7100, 8100, 9100, 1200, 2200, 3200, 4200, 5200,
            6200, 7200, 8200, 9200
    };

    public static void main(String[] args) {
        System.out.println("=== RESULTADOS PUNTO 2 - SITUACION 1 (nombres_casi_ordenados) ===");
        Resultado[] r1 = new Resultado[] {
                medirTexto("Burbuja Simple", nombres_casi_ordenados, Parcial01Punto02::burbujaSimpleTexto),
                medirTexto("Burbuja Mejorado", nombres_casi_ordenados, Parcial01Punto02::burbujaMejoradoTexto),
                medirTexto("Quick Sort", nombres_casi_ordenados, Parcial01Punto02::quickSortTexto),
                medirTexto("Shell Sort", nombres_casi_ordenados, Parcial01Punto02::shellSortTexto),
                medirTexto("Seleccion Directa", nombres_casi_ordenados, Parcial01Punto02::seleccionDirectaTexto),
                medirTexto("Insercion", nombres_casi_ordenados, Parcial01Punto02::insercionTexto)
        };
        imprimirResultados(r1);

        System.out.println();
        System.out.println("=== RESULTADOS PUNTO 2 - SITUACION 2 (numeros_casi_ordenados) ===");
        Resultado[] r2 = new Resultado[] {
                medirNumero("Burbuja Simple", numeros_casi_ordenados, Parcial01Punto02::burbujaSimpleNum),
                medirNumero("Burbuja Mejorado", numeros_casi_ordenados, Parcial01Punto02::burbujaMejoradoNum),
                medirNumero("Quick Sort", numeros_casi_ordenados, Parcial01Punto02::quickSortNum),
                medirNumero("Shell Sort", numeros_casi_ordenados, Parcial01Punto02::shellSortNum),
                medirNumero("Seleccion Directa", numeros_casi_ordenados, Parcial01Punto02::seleccionDirectaNum),
                medirNumero("Insercion", numeros_casi_ordenados, Parcial01Punto02::insercionNum)
        };
        imprimirResultados(r2);
    }

    static void imprimirResultados(Resultado[] resultados) {
        Resultado mejor = resultados[0];
        for (Resultado r : resultados) {
            System.out.printf("%-18s | Comparaciones: %-9d | Tiempo: %-10d ns | Memoria: %d bytes%n",
                    r.algoritmo, r.comparaciones, r.tiempoNs, r.memoriaBytes);
            if (r.tiempoNs < mejor.tiempoNs) mejor = r;
        }
        System.out.println("---------------------------------------------");
        System.out.println("Algoritmo mas eficiente (por tiempo): " + mejor.algoritmo);
    }

    static Resultado medirTexto(String nombre, String[] base, OrdenadorTexto metodo) {
        String[] copia = Arrays.copyOf(base, base.length);
        long memAntes = memoriaUsada();
        long inicio = System.nanoTime();
        long comparaciones = metodo.ordenar(copia);
        long fin = System.nanoTime();
        long memDespues = memoriaUsada();
        long deltaMem = Math.max(0, memDespues - memAntes);
        return new Resultado(nombre, comparaciones, fin - inicio, deltaMem);
    }

    static Resultado medirNumero(String nombre, int[] base, OrdenadorNumero metodo) {
        int[] copia = Arrays.copyOf(base, base.length);
        long memAntes = memoriaUsada();
        long inicio = System.nanoTime();
        long comparaciones = metodo.ordenar(copia);
        long fin = System.nanoTime();
        long memDespues = memoriaUsada();
        long deltaMem = Math.max(0, memDespues - memAntes);
        return new Resultado(nombre, comparaciones, fin - inicio, deltaMem);
    }

    static long memoriaUsada() {
        Runtime runtime = Runtime.getRuntime();
        return runtime.totalMemory() - runtime.freeMemory();
    }

    // ===== TEXTO =====
    static long burbujaSimpleTexto(String[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < arr.length - 1 - i; j++) {
                comp++;
                if (compararTexto(arr[j], arr[j + 1]) > 0) {
                    String t = arr[j]; arr[j] = arr[j + 1]; arr[j + 1] = t;
                }
            }
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long burbujaMejoradoTexto(String[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        boolean huboCambio;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++) {
            huboCambio = false;
            for (int j = 0; j < arr.length - 1 - i; j++) {
                comp++;
                if (compararTexto(arr[j], arr[j + 1]) > 0) {
                    String t = arr[j]; arr[j] = arr[j + 1]; arr[j + 1] = t;
                    huboCambio = true;
                }
            }
            if (!huboCambio) break;
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long quickSortTexto(String[] arr) {
        long[] comp = {0};
        quickSortRecTexto(arr, 0, arr.length - 1, comp);
        return comp[0];
    }

    static void quickSortRecTexto(String[] arr, int low, int high, long[] comp) {
        if (low < high) {
            int p = particionTexto(arr, low, high, comp);
            quickSortRecTexto(arr, low, p - 1, comp);
            quickSortRecTexto(arr, p + 1, high, comp);
        }
    }

    static int particionTexto(String[] arr, int low, int high, long[] comp) {
        String pivote = arr[high];
        int i = low - 1;
        for (int j = low; j < high; j++) {
            comp[0]++;
            if (compararTexto(arr[j], pivote) <= 0) {
                i++;
                String t = arr[i]; arr[i] = arr[j]; arr[j] = t;
            }
        }
        String t = arr[i + 1]; arr[i + 1] = arr[high]; arr[high] = t;
        return i + 1;
    }

    static long shellSortTexto(String[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int gap = arr.length / 2; gap > 0; gap /= 2) {
            for (int i = gap; i < arr.length; i++) {
                String temp = arr[i];
                int j = i;
                while (j >= gap) {
                    comp++;
                    if (compararTexto(arr[j - gap], temp) > 0) {
                        arr[j] = arr[j - gap];
                        j -= gap;
                    } else {
                        break;
                    }
                }
                arr[j] = temp;
            }
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long seleccionDirectaTexto(String[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++) {
            int min = i;
            for (int j = i + 1; j < arr.length; j++) {
                comp++;
                if (compararTexto(arr[j], arr[min]) < 0) min = j;
            }
            String t = arr[i]; arr[i] = arr[min]; arr[min] = t;
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long insercionTexto(String[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < arr.length; i++) {
            String clave = arr[i];
            int j = i - 1;
            while (j >= 0) {
                comp++;
                if (compararTexto(arr[j], clave) > 0) {
                    arr[j + 1] = arr[j];
                    j--;
                } else {
                    break;
                }
            }
            arr[j + 1] = clave;
        }
        return comp;
    }

    // ===== NUMEROS =====
    static long burbujaSimpleNum(int[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < arr.length - 1 - i; j++) {
                comp++;
                if (arr[j] > arr[j + 1]) {
                    int t = arr[j]; arr[j] = arr[j + 1]; arr[j + 1] = t;
                }
            }
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long burbujaMejoradoNum(int[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        boolean huboCambio;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++) {
            huboCambio = false;
            for (int j = 0; j < arr.length - 1 - i; j++) {
                comp++;
                if (arr[j] > arr[j + 1]) {
                    int t = arr[j]; arr[j] = arr[j + 1]; arr[j + 1] = t;
                    huboCambio = true;
                }
            }
            if (!huboCambio) break;
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long quickSortNum(int[] arr) {
        long[] comp = {0};
        quickSortRecNum(arr, 0, arr.length - 1, comp);
        return comp[0];
    }

    static void quickSortRecNum(int[] arr, int low, int high, long[] comp) {
        if (low < high) {
            int p = particionNum(arr, low, high, comp);
            quickSortRecNum(arr, low, p - 1, comp);
            quickSortRecNum(arr, p + 1, high, comp);
        }
    }

    static int particionNum(int[] arr, int low, int high, long[] comp) {
        int pivote = arr[high];
        int i = low - 1;
        for (int j = low; j < high; j++) {
            comp[0]++;
            if (arr[j] <= pivote) {
                i++;
                int t = arr[i]; arr[i] = arr[j]; arr[j] = t;
            }
        }
        int t = arr[i + 1]; arr[i + 1] = arr[high]; arr[high] = t;
        return i + 1;
    }

    static long shellSortNum(int[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int gap = arr.length / 2; gap > 0; gap /= 2) {
            for (int i = gap; i < arr.length; i++) {
                int temp = arr[i];
                int j = i;
                while (j >= gap) {
                    comp++;
                    if (arr[j - gap] > temp) {
                        arr[j] = arr[j - gap];
                        j -= gap;
                    } else {
                        break;
                    }
                }
                arr[j] = temp;
            }
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long seleccionDirectaNum(int[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++) {
            int min = i;
            for (int j = i + 1; j < arr.length; j++) {
                comp++;
                if (arr[j] < arr[min]) min = j;
            }
            int t = arr[i]; arr[i] = arr[min]; arr[min] = t;
        }
        return comp;
    }

    static long insercionNum(int[] arr) {
        long comp = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i < arr.length; i++) {
            int clave = arr[i];
            int j = i - 1;
            while (j >= 0) {
                comp++;
                if (arr[j] > clave) {
                    arr[j + 1] = arr[j];
                    j--;
                } else {
                    break;
                }
            }
            arr[j + 1] = clave;
        }
        return comp;
    }
}

Output del punto
